conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the most significant connection to C, as our shared desire to provide security for our parents made the stakes feel deeply personal and mutual. My interactions with A and F also stood out because we moved beyond small talk to form explicit pacts to protect each other's interests throughout the game. Although B and I shared similar family-oriented motivations, I felt the least connected to them simply because our conversation didn't evolve into the same level of strategic partnership or deep personal resonance as the others.

I made clear agreements with A, F, and E to work together so that we all walk away with a portion of the prize, while G and I agreed to keep each other in the loop. I feel a strong sense of trust in C due to our shared values, and I'm relying on the mutual commitments I made with A and F to navigate the upcoming challenges. I don't have any specific reasons to distrust anyone yet, but I'm staying observant to see if anyone's behavior shifts once the game starts.
